title: Complaint Resolution Rate KPI for Hotels in Egypt
formula: (Number of Complaints Resolved within Target Timeframe / Total Number of Complaints Received) * 100
description: This KPI measures the efficiency and effectiveness of the hotel's ability to resolve guest complaints within a specified timeframe. It is a critical metric for ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction and maintaining brand reputation in the competitive hospitality market in Egypt. The target resolution rate is set at 90%, reflecting the industry's commitment to addressing guest concerns promptly.
